description: This file is an HTML document implementing a web-based database visualization interface, including frontend structure, styles, and JavaScript logic for interacting with backend APIs to list databases, tables, and display data.

methods.name: loadDatabases()
methods.description: Fetches the list of available databases from backend API and updates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases()
methods.description: Refreshes the database list by re-fetching from backend and resets the UI.

methods.name: toggleDatabase(db)
methods.description: Expands or collapses a database entry in sidebar and loads its tables.

methods.name: loadTables(db)
methods.description: Fetches list of tables for the specified database and displays them.

methods.name: loadTableData(db, tableName)
methods.description: Fetches data for a specific table and renders it in the data view.

methods.name: renderTable(container, data)
methods.description: Renders a table with provided data into the given container element.

methods.name: renderCell(value)
methods.description: Generates HTML for individual cell content, handling objects, long strings, and null values.

methods.name: expandCell(element)
methods.description: Expands or collapses a cell displaying large content or objects.
